Operation 'mobilemoneypayout' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (recipient phone, amount, network), supported networks, and what the response contains. Added details about required parameters, supported networks for consistency with deposit operation, fee structure context, and expected response information to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Send money to mobile money account
data.current_description: Sends money from EasyPay account to a mobile money account. Variable fees based on amount range. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=mmpayout.
data.description_suggestion: Sends money from your EasyPay account to a recipient's mobile money account. Supports MTN, Airtel, Africell, and UTL networks. Variable payout fees apply based on transaction amount. Requires a valid recipient phone number and amount. Returns a payout reference and transaction status. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=mmpayout.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (recipient phone, amount, network), supported networks, and what the response contains. Added details about required parameters, supported networks for consistency with deposit operation, fee structure context, and expected response information to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'checktransactionstatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic and doesn't specify the lookup method (by reference). Description lacks input requirements and output details. Enhanced summary to clarify the reference-based lookup. Expanded description to specify required input (reference ID) and expected response fields (status, amount, recipient, timestamp) for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns the status of a mobile money transaction by reference. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=mmstatus.
data.summary_suggestion: Query mobile money transaction status by reference
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a mobile money transaction using its transaction reference. Accepts a transaction reference ID as input and returns the transaction status (pending, completed, failed, etc.), amount, recipient details, and timestamp. Useful for tracking deposit and payout operations. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=mmstatus.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't specify the lookup method (by reference). Description lacks input requirements and output details. Enhanced summary to clarify the reference-based lookup. Expanded description to specify required input (reference ID) and expected response fields (status, amount, recipient, timestamp) for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'checkaccountbalance' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about return values and currency context. Added details about response format (balance amount, currency, account status), clarified that no parameters are required, and provided context about when this operation is useful (pre-transaction verification). This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves the current account balance at EasyPay. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=checkbalance.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current account balance for your EasyPay account in USD. Returns the available balance, currency, and account status. No parameters required. Useful for verifying funds before initiating payouts or deposits. The actual endpoint is POST /api/ with action=checkbalance.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about return values and currency context. Added details about response format (balance amount, currency, account status), clarified that no parameters are required, and provided context about when this operation is useful (pre-transaction verification). This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to call this operation.
